info.title: Wildon Gateway API
info.description: Complete HTTP API surface exposed by gateway-service.

tags.name: Live Chat
tags.description: Real-time queue-based support chat. WebSocket at `/ws/chat`; REST session management at `/v1/chat/*`. Routed directly to chat-service via ingress (bypasses gateway middleware).

get.description: Machine-readable list of supported OAuth scopes and usage intent.

post.summary: Login with password (returns MFA challenge when required)

401.description: Invalid login credentials or account access issue

error.message: We couldn't find an account with that email address.

meta.email: We couldn't find an account with that email address.

error.message: The password you entered is incorrect.

meta.password: The password you entered is incorrect.

get.summary: List active and historical sessions for authenticated user

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Offset cursor from previous page. Example: `/v1/auth/sessions?limit=20&cursor=20`.

post.summary: Logout a specific session by session id
Logout all sessions for authenticated user

get.summary: Get MFA factor status for authenticated user

post.summary: Begin authenticator setup (returns secret + otpauth URI + QR)
Confirm authenticator setup with OTP code

schema.description: Rich care-circle person create payload. Provide either first_name or display_name. Legacy name/phone/relationship fields are still accepted and derived.
Rich care-circle person update payload. Arrays replace the stored phones/relationships when supplied.

get.summary: List all known device models and capabilities

post.summary: Validate IMEI against inventory (pre-check before activation)
Activate a device by IMEI (claims from inventory, creates device)

get.summary: List devices owned by the authenticated user

post.summary: Assign device to a care circle member

get.summary: Get latest telemetry for device (battery, signal, vitals)

post.summary: Import batch of IMEIs into inventory (admin)

get.description:
Upgrade to a WebSocket connection for real-time chat. Pass the JWT as `?token=<jwt>`.

**Routed directly to chat-service** (bypasses gateway auth middleware).

**User flow:** connect → receive `queue_pos` → wait → receive `assigned` → exchange messages → `close_session`.

**Agent flow (aud=control):** connect → receive `queue_update` → send `claim_session` → exchange messages → `close_session`.

See the [Chat API spec](/openapi/chat-v1.json) for the full message protocol.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: JWT access token. Audience must be `public`, `platform`, or `control`.

get.description: Returns the session with its full message history. Routed directly to chat-service.
Returns all sessions currently in `waiting` status. Routed directly to chat-service.

clientIdHeader.name: X-Client-Id
clientIdHeader.description: Registered client identifier required on non-bypass gateway routes.

XAppVersionHeader.name: X-App-Version
XAppVersionHeader.description: Optional app version used for client version policy checks.

XDeviceIdHeader.name: X-Device-Id
XDeviceIdHeader.description: Optional stable device identifier for app sessions.

XIdempotencyKeyHeader.name: X-Idempotency-Key
XIdempotencyKeyHeader.description: Optional idempotency key for safe retry of mutation requests.

factor_type.description: Optional factor override. Defaults to challenge factor.
